generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and security, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws aren't enough to protect us from emerging threats. While some worry about civil liberties, we can't afford to be naive. Other countries are already enhancing their domestic security powers - why shouldn't we do the same to protect our families? The alternative is leaving ourselves vulnerable. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
